offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in expense reporting. We automate categorization instead of manual entry and categorization of expenses.
problem: Manual categorization of bank statement transactions is time-consuming.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual categorization option and export to CSV on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
